interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including featured service categories, featured packages, and trust highlights.

category_label.description: User-facing name, e.g., 'Full Body Color Change'

interfaces.name: getServiceCategories
interfaces.description: Get list of service categories for navigation and filters (e.g., full body color change, full body repaint).

name.description: Display name, e.g., 'Full Body Color Change'

interfaces.name: getServicePackages
interfaces.description: Search and filter service packages for Services & Packages page by category, vehicle type, price range, clear coat type, etc.

interfaces.name: getServicePackageDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific service package for the Package Detail page.

interfaces.name: addPackageToCart
interfaces.description: Add a service package to the single-user cart, creating the cart if it does not exist.

parameters.name: vehicleType
parameters.description: Vehicle type for the cart item, e.g., 'suv', 'coupe', '2_door_coupe'

parameters.name: configurationId
parameters.description: Optional paint configuration id if from configurator

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user cart summary for the Booking & Checkout page.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCart
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the current cart and return updated totals, used on checkout or booking summary.

interfaces.name: getBookingPageData
interfaces.description: Get initial data for the Booking & Checkout page for a selected package, including package summary, allowed vehicle types, and location options.

interfaces.name: getAvailableAppointmentSlots
interfaces.description: Get available appointment slots for a given location, package, and date for the booking form.

parameters.name: packageId
parameters.description: Optional package filter if slots are package-specific

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Optional start time filter in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Optional end time filter in 'HH:MM' 24-hour format

interfaces.name: calculatePackagePriceWithPromo
interfaces.description: Calculate price and discount for a package and optional configuration with a promo code, without creating a booking.

interfaces.name: placeBooking
interfaces.description: Create a confirmed booking for the selected package, location, time slot, and contact details.

parameters.name: appointmentSlotId
parameters.description: Selected appointment slot id from getAvailableAppointmentSlots

interfaces.name: getBookingDetails
interfaces.description: Get booking confirmation details for display on the Booking Confirmation page.

interfaces.name: getConfiguratorInitData
interfaces.description: Get initial options for the Custom Paint Configurator, including vehicle types, color options, and finish types.

interfaces.name: getPaintConfigurations
interfaces.description: Search paint configurations for the configurator based on vehicle type, colors, finish, two-tone flag, and budget.

interfaces.name: getPaintConfigurationDetails
interfaces.description: Get details of a specific paint configuration and its underlying service package.

interfaces.name: savePaintConfiguration
interfaces.description: Save a selected paint configuration to the user's saved items/quotes.

parameters.name: savedName
parameters.description: Optional user-friendly name for the saved configuration

interfaces.name: getSavedConfigurations
interfaces.description: Get all saved paint configurations for display on the Favorites & Saved Items page.

interfaces.name: searchLocations
interfaces.description: Search for shop locations by ZIP/postal code, radius, and sort order for the Locations Search page.

interfaces.name: getLocationDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific shop location for the Location Detail page.

interfaces.name: getGalleryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available finish types and color options for the Gallery filters.

interfaces.name: getGalleryItems
interfaces.description: Get gallery items with filters for finish type, color, vehicle type, and service category.

interfaces.name: addFavoriteGalleryItem
interfaces.description: Favorite a gallery item from the Gallery page.

interfaces.name: removeFavoriteGalleryItem
interfaces.description: Remove a gallery item from favorites.

interfaces.name: getFavoriteGalleryItems
interfaces.description: Get all favorited gallery items for the Favorites & Saved Items page.

interfaces.name: getContactFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get inquiry types and preferred contact method options for the Contact form.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a contact inquiry, including fleet & commercial color-matching requests.

parameters.name: fleetSize
parameters.description: Approximate fleet size for fleet inquiries, e.g., 8

interfaces.name: getActiveSpecialOffers
interfaces.description: Get active special offers and promo codes for the Special Offers page.

interfaces.name: addPackageToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a service package to the comparison list for the Package Comparison page.

interfaces.name: removePackageFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a service package from the comparison list.

interfaces.name: getComparisonListDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for all packages in the comparison list for the Package Comparison page.

interfaces.name: clearComparisonList
interfaces.description: Clear all packages from the comparison list.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page including company history, mission, and trust information.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get FAQ entries grouped by category for the FAQ page.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfServiceContent
interfaces.description: Get Terms of Service content for the Terms of Service page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get Privacy Policy content for the Privacy Policy page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the existing cart from storage or create a new one for the single user, without needing a cart id parameter.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute subtotal, discount, and total for the cart after items or promos change.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateComparisonList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or initialize the current comparison list for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _validateAndResolvePromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that validates a promo code against SpecialOffer rules and determines applicable discounts for given packages or cart.

helperFunctions.name: _getUserFavoritesState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load and persist the user's favorite gallery items without requiring a user id.

helperFunctions.name: _filterAndSortServicePackages
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that applies filter and sort logic to ServicePackage records for getServicePackages.

helperFunctions.name: _filterAndSortPaintConfigurations
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that applies filter and sort logic to PaintConfiguration records for getPaintConfigurations.

helperFunctions.name: _findNearestLocationsByZip
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to geocode a ZIP/postal code and find nearby active locations within a radius for searchLocations.

helperFunctions.name: _getAvailableSlotsForDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find available AppointmentSlot records for a given location, package, and date/time range.
